description_long: This helmet features a sleek, futuristic design with a smooth, metallic gray shell and angular contours. The front is equipped with a prominent face shield area, flanked by two raised cheek sections and subtle pink-tinted visor panels. The top and sides are adorned with black, hexagonal mesh-like ventilation panels, adding both texture and functionality. The rear and sides display layered, circular segments and pronounced ridges, giving the helmet a robust, armored appearance. There are no visible logos or graphic designs, and the surface is mostly uniform in color and finish. The helmet appears to be constructed primarily from hard plastic or composite materials, with some mesh and possible internal padding.
description: A sleek, metallic gray helmet with angular contours, black hexagonal mesh vents, and pink-tinted visor panels, featuring a futuristic, armored design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the angular face shield, pink-tinted visor panels, and the central ridge running from top to bottom.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the circular segment pattern, black mesh ventilation, and the pronounced rear ridges.
description_view_2: Top view reveals the smooth dome with extensive black hexagonal mesh covering the upper surface.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same circular segment, mesh vent, and rear ridges.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Three large black hexagonal mesh ventilation panels on the top and sides, integrated into the helmet's shell.
